message:
Register all new E2E test families in unified_reliability_suite.sh

Why: The 15 new E2E test files and the reliability benchmark added in
previous commits need to be wired into the unified test runner so they
execute as part of smoke/nightly/full CI modes. Without registration,
these tests exist but would never run in CI.

What changed:
  - Added 15 new run_* functions, one per E2E test family:
    run_cross_worker_parity, run_soak_concurrency,
    run_deterministic_replay, run_performance_budget,
    run_local_remote_parity, run_feature_flags_rollout,
    run_contract_drift, run_redaction_retention,
    run_reliability_doctor, run_ux_regression, run_coverage_matrix,
    run_ci_test_tiers, run_slo_guardrails, run_docs_validation,
    run_release_gate_signoff

  - Registered all 15 families in the main() dispatch table so they run
    in every CI invocation (smoke, nightly, full).

  - Added run_nightly_reliability_benchmarks function that invokes
    'cargo bench -p rch-common --bench reliability_bench -- --quick'
    and registered it as a nightly-only family.

Each function uses CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target to isolate
build artifacts and runs with --nocapture for structured log visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -230,6 +230,30 @@ run_classification_regression() {
   )
 }
 
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Family: cross-worker parity (bd-vvmd.7.10)
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+
+run_cross_worker_parity() {
+  log "running cross-worker determinism/parity E2E scenarios"
+  (
+    cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
+    CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target cargo test -p rch-common --test cross_worker_parity_e2e -- --nocapture
+  )
+}
+
+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@@ -327,6 +515,21 @@ main() {
   run_family "fault_injection"           run_fault_injection

   # --- Nightly families (only in nightly/full mode) ---

@@ -336,6 +539,7 @@ main() {
     nightly|full)
       run_family "nightly_topology_deep"      run_nightly_topology_deep
       run_family "nightly_contract_schema"    run_nightly_contract_schema_deep
+      run_family "nightly_benchmarks"         run_nightly_reliability_benchmarks
       ;;
     *)
       fail "unknown RCH_E2E_MODE=$E2E_MODE (expected smoke|nightly|full)"
